sentences.arabic: حِمَايَةُ الْمَعْلُومَاتِ الشَّخْصِيَّةِ عَلَى الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ أَمْرٌ مُهِمٌّ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Zaštita ličnih podataka na internetu je veoma važna stvar.
sentences.translationEn: Protecting personal information on the internet is very important.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ نَسْتَخْدِمَ كَلِمَاتِ مُرُورٍ قَوِيَّةً لِحِسَابَاتِنَا الرَّقْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Moramo koristiti jake lozinke za naše digitalne račune.
sentences.translationEn: We must use strong passwords for our digital accounts.

sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ خُبَرَاءُ الْأَمْنِ السِّيْبِرَانِيِّ عَلَى مَنْعِ الِاخْتِرَاقِ الْإِلِكْتُرُونِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Stručnjaci za sajber sigurnost rade na sprečavanju elektronskog hakovanja.
sentences.translationEn: Cybersecurity experts work to prevent electronic hacking.
